title: serapias neglecta subsp. ionica
intro: Serapias neglecta subsp. ionica, also known as Ionian Serapias, is a rare species of orchid native to the Ionian Islands in Greece. This orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of wounds. Herbal preparations of Serapias neglecta subsp. ionica include infusions and tinctures, although its use is largely based on folklore and further scientific research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
